# DAGent Demo — Copilot Instructions

> This branch (`demo/single-file-pipeline`) is a stripped-down demo of the
> agentic-pipeline core idea. **DO NOT MERGE.** Production code lives on
> `project/temporal-migration`.

## What this branch is

A ~750-LOC single-file demo pipeline at [demo/](demo/). 6 nodes
(dev → unit-test → e2e-author → e2e-runner → storefront-debug + a
`pr-creation` finalizer that always runs) driven by a linear runner with
JSON-on-disk state and index-jump failure routing. No Temporal, no DAG
kernel, no distributed system. `Ctrl+C` is the admin interface.

## Layout

| Path | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [demo/](demo/) | The demo pipeline source |
| [demo/README.md](demo/README.md) | How to run |
| [demo/prompts/](demo/prompts/) | Auto-generated agent prompts (regenerated by `npm run build:prompts`) |
| [apps/commerce-storefront/.apm/](apps/commerce-storefront/.apm/) | Source-of-truth APM instructions/agents (read by the prompt flattener) |
| [apps/commerce-storefront/](apps/commerce-storefront/) | The PWA Kit storefront target app |
| [demo/scripts/](demo/scripts/) | Reused shell wrappers: `agent-branch.sh`, `agent-commit.sh`, `setup-roam.sh`, `poll-ci.sh` |

## Run

```bash
npm install
npm run demo -- \
  --slug demo-quick-view \
  --app apps/commerce-storefront \
  --spec apps/commerce-storefront/quick_view_new_spec.md \
  --e2e-guide demo/inputs/e2e-guide.md
```

## Hard rules

1. Pipeline state lives in `demo/.runs/<slug>/state.json`. Never edit by hand.
2. Git operations only via `demo/scripts/agent-{commit,branch}.sh`.
3. roam-code MCP is bootstrapped by `demo/scripts/setup-roam.sh`.
4. Source for the agent prompts is `apps/commerce-storefront/.apm/`. Editing
   `demo/prompts/*.md` directly is futile — those files regenerate.
